full_text:
He Xi (Mengsun) 何熙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Xi (何熙), styledMengsun, was born in Chen. Noted for height, died of sickness after successfully fighting tribes. He Xi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. He Xi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
